channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: b1e6a0dd-ea0f-4108-8925-7047693f2cfe
Display name: CloudTest Leased VM Reader
Description: Can view CloudTest leased VM's credentials
Link: https://management.azure.com/b1e6a0dd-ea0f-4108-8925-7047693f2cfe?api-version=2022-04-01
